productDisplayName: Turtle Men Reversible Leather Black Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts are an integral part of creating a well groomed look. This reversible black and brown leather belt from turtle is set to add a sophisticated edge to your style. You'll not only look stylish in this belt, but you can also rest easy knowing that you're supporting a company who care about the Earth. The brand has a great program in place for saving sea turtles in Orissa. Length at largest setting : 98 cm Made of leather with a glossy textured finish for absolute durability, comfort and style Stylish press clasp and holes to customise Fit Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality if necessary
